headline: California Climate Credit Brings Summer Bill Relief to PG&E Customers
summary: Over the next two months, millions of residential Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) customers will see two California Climate Credits automatically applied to their summer energy bills.

raw.headline: California Climate Credit Brings Summer Bill Relief to PG&E Customers
raw.summary: Over the next two months, millions of residential Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) customers will see two California Climate Credits automatically applied to their summer energy bills.

headline: PG&E Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: PCG readies to report Q2 earnings as higher electric demand, new rates and lower operating costs are expected to support results.
